prompt: Create a 30-second Manim explainer that combines a moving point, a tangent-style line, and shaded accumulation on the same graph. Use trackers and live redraws so the story evolves through multiple beats instead of one static figure.
completion:
from manim import *

class TrackerTangentAreaStory(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        def curve(x):
            return 0.08 * (x - 1.2) * (x - 4.8) * (x - 6.1) + 2.4

        def tangent_segment(x_value, width=1.2):
            slope = (curve(x_value + 0.02) - curve(x_value - 0.02)) / 0.04
            center = axes.c2p(x_value, curve(x_value))
            dx = width / (2 * np.sqrt(1 + slope**2))
            dy = slope * dx
            return Line(center + np.array([-dx, -dy, 0]), center + np.array([dx, dy, 0]), color=YELLOW_D, stroke_width=6)

        title = Text("A Moving Point Tells Two Stories", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        axes = Axes(x_range=[0, 7, 1], y_range=[0, 4.5, 1], x_length=8.8, y_length=4.8, tips=False).shift(DOWN * 0.3)
        graph = axes.plot(curve, x_range=[0.2, 6.8], color=BLUE_D)
        x_tracker = ValueTracker(1.2)
        probe = always_redraw(lambda: Dot(axes.c2p(x_tracker.get_value(), curve(x_tracker.get_value())), color=YELLOW, radius=0.08))
        guide = always_redraw(lambda: DashedLine(axes.c2p(x_tracker.get_value(), 0), probe.get_center(), color=GRAY_B, stroke_width=3))
        tangent = always_redraw(lambda: tangent_segment(x_tracker.get_value()))
        area = always_redraw(lambda: axes.get_area(graph, x_range=(0.4, x_tracker.get_value()), color=TEAL_D, opacity=0.22))
        readout = always_redraw(lambda: VGroup(Text("x", font_size=24, color=GRAY_D), DecimalNumber(x_tracker.get_value(), num_decimal_places=2, font_size=28, color=YELLOW_D)).arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.15).to_corner(UR).shift(DOWN * 0.6))
        caption_a = Text("The point moves, the local slope rotates, and the accumulated area grows.", font_size=25, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("One graph can support local and global reasoning at the same time.", font_size=25, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(axes), Create(graph), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeIn(area), FadeIn(probe), Create(guide), Create(tangent), FadeIn(readout), FadeIn(caption_a), run_time=4)
        self.play(x_tracker.animate.set_value(2.6), run_time=5)
        self.play(x_tracker.animate.set_value(4.4), run_time=5)
        self.play(ReplacementTransform(caption_a, caption_b), x_tracker.animate.set_value(5.9), run_time=5)
        self.wait(2)

prompt: Create a 50-second Manim scene that combines token flow, an attention score panel, and a residual merge step. Make it read like one coherent walkthrough with staged reveals, synchronized emphasis, and a final text morph to the output description.
completion:
from manim import *

class AttentionResidualMergeStory(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Attention Plus Residual Mixing", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        tokens = VGroup(*[VGroup(RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.08, width=1.35, height=0.62, color=BLUE_D, fill_opacity=0.14), Text(label, font_size=22)) for label in ["query", "key", "value"]]).arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.25).shift(UP * 2.2)
        for group in tokens:
            group[1].move_to(group[0])
        block = RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.1, width=2.2, height=1.0, color=TEAL_D, fill_opacity=0.14).shift(UP * 0.5)
        block_label = Text("attention block", font_size=24, color=TEAL_D).move_to(block)
        heatmap_cells = VGroup(*[Square(side_length=0.42, stroke_color=GRAY_B, fill_color=ORANGE, fill_opacity=opacity) for opacity in [0.18, 0.72, 0.35, 0.28, 0.61, 0.82, 0.22, 0.48, 0.66]]).arrange_in_grid(rows=3, cols=3, buff=0.04).shift(LEFT * 2.8 + DOWN * 1.5)
        score_title = Text("scores", font_size=22, color=ORANGE).next_to(heatmap_cells, UP, buff=0.18)
        residual = Arrow(tokens[0].get_bottom(), RIGHT * 0.1 + DOWN * 2.0, buff=0.15, color=GRAY_C, stroke_width=5)
        residual_tip = Arrow(RIGHT * 0.1 + DOWN * 2.0, RIGHT * 2.7 + DOWN * 2.0, buff=0.0, color=GRAY_C, stroke_width=5)
        merge_box = RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.1, width=2.2, height=0.9, color=GREEN_D, fill_opacity=0.14).shift(RIGHT * 3.3 + DOWN * 1.5)
        merge_label = Text("merge + norm", font_size=24, color=GREEN_D).move_to(merge_box)
        output_text = Text("mixed context", font_size=30, color=GREEN_D).next_to(merge_box, DOWN, buff=0.4)
        final_text = Text("context-aware output", font_size=30, color=GREEN_D).move_to(output_text)
        arrows_in = VGroup(*[Arrow(group[0].get_bottom(), block.get_top(), buff=0.12, color=BLUE_B, stroke_width=4) for group in tokens])
        arrow_to_scores = Arrow(block.get_left(), heatmap_cells.get_top(), buff=0.2, color=ORANGE, stroke_width=4)
        arrow_to_merge = Arrow(block.get_right(), merge_box.get_top(), buff=0.25, color=TEAL_D, stroke_width=5)
        caption_a = Text("First the tokens feed an attention block.", font_size=25, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("The score panel decides which value content matters most.", font_size=25, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_c = Text("A residual path preserves the original signal before the merge.", font_size=25, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(group) for group in tokens], lag_ratio=0.18), run_time=4)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[GrowArrow(arrow) for arrow in arrows_in], lag_ratio=0.12), FadeIn(block), FadeIn(block_label), FadeIn(caption_a), run_time=4)
        self.play(GrowArrow(arrow_to_scores), LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(cell) for cell in heatmap_cells], lag_ratio=0.08), FadeIn(score_title), ReplacementTransform(caption_a, caption_b), run_time=5)
        self.play(AnimationGroup(*[cell.animate.set_fill(YELLOW_D, opacity=0.3) for cell in heatmap_cells[3:6]], lag_ratio=0.0), run_time=3)
        self.play(GrowArrow(arrow_to_merge), FadeIn(merge_box), FadeIn(merge_label), GrowArrow(residual), GrowArrow(residual_tip), ReplacementTransform(caption_b, caption_c), run_time=5)
        self.play(FadeIn(output_text), run_time=2)
        self.play(TransformMatchingShapes(output_text, final_text), run_time=3)
        self.wait(3)

prompt: Create a 30-second Manim explainer that combines a titration curve, a moving equivalence tracker, and a small summary table. Highlight the acidic, rapid-change, and basic regions as separate beats instead of just showing the final chart.
completion:
from manim import *

class TitrationTableTrackerStory(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Reading a Titration Curve in Stages", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        axes = Axes(x_range=[0, 10, 1], y_range=[0, 14, 2], x_length=7.2, y_length=4.6, tips=False).shift(LEFT * 1.7 + DOWN * 0.2)
        curve = axes.plot(lambda x: 7 + 3.1 * np.tanh((x - 5.0) * 1.2) + 0.12 * (x - 5.0), x_range=[0.6, 9.4], color=BLUE_D)
        tracker = ValueTracker(2.0)
        probe = always_redraw(lambda: Dot(axes.i2gp(tracker.get_value(), curve), color=YELLOW, radius=0.08))
        probe_line = always_redraw(lambda: DashedLine(axes.c2p(tracker.get_value(), 0), probe.get_center(), color=YELLOW_D, stroke_width=3))
        eq_line = DashedLine(axes.c2p(5, 0), axes.c2p(5, 14), color=RED_D, stroke_width=4)
        eq_label = Text("equivalence", font_size=22, color=RED_D).next_to(eq_line, UP)
        table = MathTable([["region", "shape"], ["acidic", "slow rise"], ["transition", "steep jump"], ["basic", "plateau"]], include_outer_lines=True).scale(0.42).to_edge(RIGHT).shift(DOWN * 0.2)
        row_a = SurroundingRectangle(table.get_rows()[1], color=BLUE_D, buff=0.05)
        row_b = SurroundingRectangle(table.get_rows()[2], color=YELLOW_D, buff=0.05)
        row_c = SurroundingRectangle(table.get_rows()[3], color=GREEN_D, buff=0.05)
        caption_a = Text("Early on, the pH moves slowly while acid still dominates.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("Near equivalence, a small volume change produces a large pH jump.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_c = Text("After the jump, extra base keeps the curve on its upper plateau.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(axes), Create(curve), FadeIn(table), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeIn(probe), Create(probe_line), Create(row_a), FadeIn(caption_a), run_time=4)
        self.play(tracker.animate.set_value(4.7), run_time=5)
        self.play(Create(eq_line), FadeIn(eq_label), ReplacementTransform(row_a, row_b), ReplacementTransform(caption_a, caption_b), run_time=5)
        self.play(tracker.animate.set_value(5.4), run_time=4)
        self.play(tracker.animate.set_value(8.5), ReplacementTransform(row_b, row_c), ReplacementTransform(caption_b, caption_c), run_time=5)
        self.wait(2)

prompt: Create a 30-second Manim scene that combines circular motion, a live projection line, and a traced sine-like output on a separate axis. Use continuous animation so the motion, projection, and trace all reinforce each other.
completion:
from manim import *

class CircularProjectionStory(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Circular Motion Creates a Projected Wave", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        orbit = Circle(radius=1.35, color=BLUE_D).shift(LEFT * 3.3)
        center = Dot(orbit.get_center(), color=GRAY_B, radius=0.05)
        theta = ValueTracker(0.0)
        moving_dot = always_redraw(lambda: Dot(orbit.point_at_angle(theta.get_value()), color=YELLOW, radius=0.08))
        projection_target = always_redraw(lambda: Dot(RIGHT * 1.2 + UP * np.sin(theta.get_value()) * 1.35, color=TEAL_D, radius=0.07))
        projection_line = always_redraw(lambda: DashedLine(moving_dot.get_center(), np.array([projection_target.get_center()[0], moving_dot.get_center()[1], 0]), color=GRAY_C, stroke_width=3))
        bridge_line = always_redraw(lambda: DashedLine(np.array([projection_target.get_center()[0], moving_dot.get_center()[1], 0]), projection_target.get_center(), color=TEAL_D, stroke_width=3))
        axes = Axes(x_range=[0, 7, 1], y_range=[-1.6, 1.6, 0.5], x_length=5.6, y_length=3.0, tips=False).shift(RIGHT * 3.1)
        wave_trace = TracedPath(projection_target.get_center, stroke_color=TEAL_D, stroke_width=4)
        radial_line = always_redraw(lambda: Line(orbit.get_center(), moving_dot.get_center(), color=YELLOW_D, stroke_width=5))
        label_circle = Text("rotation", font_size=22, color=BLUE_D).next_to(orbit, DOWN)
        label_wave = Text("projection", font_size=22, color=TEAL_D).next_to(axes, DOWN)
        caption_a = Text("The rotating point carries a vertical projection height.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("Tracing that height over time turns circular motion into a wave.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.add(wave_trace)
        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(orbit), FadeIn(center), Create(axes), FadeIn(label_circle), FadeIn(label_wave), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeIn(moving_dot), Create(radial_line), Create(projection_line), Create(bridge_line), FadeIn(projection_target), FadeIn(caption_a), run_time=4)
        self.play(theta.animate.set_value(TAU), run_time=8, rate_func=linear)
        self.play(ReplacementTransform(caption_a, caption_b), theta.animate.set_value(2 * TAU), run_time=8, rate_func=linear)
        self.wait(2)
